title: Study to Compare AMG 510 "Proposed INN Sotorasib" With Docetaxel in Non Small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC) (CodeBreak 200).

eligibility.text: Men or women greater than or equal to 18 years old.
eligibility.justification: This criterion ensures eligibility for all participants, ensuring a diverse and representative sample.

eligibility.text: Pathologically documented, previously treated, locally-advanced and unresectable or metastatic NSCLC with KRAS p.G12C mutation confirmed through central testing or have documentation of KRAS p.G12C mutation through Amgen Study 20190294 prior to enrollment
eligibility.justification: This criterion ensures the study population is homogeneous and allows for a direct comparison between treatment groups.
This criterion protects patients from potential harm by excluding those with active brain metastases, which could pose risks to their health.

eligibility.text: Myocardial infarction within 6 months of study day 1
eligibility.justification: This criterion protects patients from known harm by excluding those who have experienced a myocardial infarction in the recent past, which could increase their risk of complications.

eligibility.text: Gastrointestinal (GI) tract disease causing the inability to take oral medication
eligibility.justification: This criterion ensures data quality and patient adherence by excluding those who cannot tolerate oral medication due to GI issues.

endpoints.timeframe: Baseline up to primary analysis data cut-off date (02 August 2022); max time on study as of primary analysis data cut off was 24.3 months

adaptive_designs.description: Standard fixed-design trial. No adaptive features detected.

safety_adverse_events.ae_ascertainment: Not explicitly described (assumed standard investigator reporting)
safety_adverse_events.safety_monitoring: Investigator-reported with sponsor oversight (no DSMB mentioned)
